biome_pearls_complete.title: Collect Ender Pearls from at least 12 different Enderman Overhaul biome variants

magical_enderman.title: Encounter the Magical Enderman variant (unclassified — Enderman Overhaul, unknown biome)

subtitle.text: They are not hostile. They are territorial. There is a difference.

description: Each has a distinct appearance and passive behavior.
Most drop standard Ender Pearls — a few have unique drops.
Forests, Desert, Swamp, Jungle, Mesa/Badlands, Frozen/Snowy plains,
Warped Forest (Nether), Mushroom Island, Beach, Ocean, Mountain,
Savanna, Dark Forest, Crimson Forest, Basalt Deltas...
It has unique visual effects and may have special drops.
If you find it, observe it carefully before engaging.
This questbook does not know what it is.
That is intentional. Discover it yourself.
→ Collect pearls from 12 different Enderman variants [check]
